---
title: "BBFM"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: yes
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{BBFM}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
# Overview
```{r model_family_header, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_header(
  status = c("experimental", "unvalidated"),
  pages = c(
    `Reference documentation` = "../../reference/BBFM.html",
    `Related workflow` = "../combining-components/combining-components.html"
  )
)
```
